question.label: Concrete examples
question.name: Which recent piece of work best shows your current quality bar?
question.description: Forces a specific artifact into view so the feedback can be grounded in real work rather than abstractions.

answer: I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.

assessment.note: Deficiency-as-request: he names missing examples of excellent junior-level work, signalling strong role-bar confusion and mild growth blockage.

new_queue.label: Thread follow
new_queue.name: want clearer examples — can you say more about what that means for you right now?

new_queue.name: What changed in your day-to-day after the last round of feedback?

new_queue.label: Quality misses
new_queue.name: Where do you think your work most often misses the bar?

new_queue.label: Working definition
new_queue.name: How do you decide when a design is ready to ship?

new_queue.name: What would you like to have changed by our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
